one_time_description: Loss on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Nation has investments in government business enterprises including Skwlax Investments Inc., 0990532 B.C. Ltd., Skwlax Timber Limited Partnership, Skwlax Aggregates LLP, and Skwlax Aggregates Ltd. Natural resource management is a major segment generating $8.76M in revenue. Nation purchased $3.2M in services from Skw'lax Resource Management and $319K from Skw'lax Investments Inc.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on GBE equity pick-up of $252,404 for Skw'lax Investments Inc., 0990532 BC Ltd., and Skwlax Timber Limited Partnership; (2) management has not completed PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations assessment as required from April 1, 2022. GBEs are carried at $14,684,538 on balance sheet. Social Housing is the only fully consolidated subsidiary. Five GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Segment payroll total from segment disclosure is $7,916,771 vs $7,580,147 in expenses by object — discrepancy noted. No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text. Large increase in accounts payable from $1.4M to $6.96M year-over-year. Work in progress of $11.4M is a significant new capital addition. Audit report dated October 31, 2025 — very late filing.
